note: If/then fill logic (authored + derived): conditional-required, attachment/companion-form triggers, value incompatibilities, and value inferences. Warnings-only — evaluated by tools/logic_engine.py at preflight/fill time; nothing here blocks or alters a fill. Not legal advice.

rules.message: Adjusted gross income (primary) cannot exceed gross income — adjustments only reduce gross income. Check lines for the primary care provider.
Adjusted gross income (non-primary) cannot exceed gross income — adjustments only reduce gross income. Check lines for the non-primary care provider.
You indicated an attachment ('Supplementalworksheet') — make sure the document is actually attached to the filing.
